title: Complex Mortgage Solutions
metaTitle: Complex Mortgage Solutions BC — Multi-Property & High-Net-Worth
metaDescription: Tailored mortgage structures for multi-property investors, high-net-worth borrowers, and complex income or asset situations across BC and Canada.
intro: Some files don't fit any standard category — they need a tailored structure. That's where 15 years of lender relationships matter most.

body.heading: What 'complex' usually looks like
paragraphs: Multi-property portfolios crossing residential and commercial. High-net-worth borrowers with most wealth in corporate, trust or investment structures rather than personal income. Cross-border income (US, UK, EU, Asia) with multi-jurisdictional tax filings. Inheritance and estate-driven mortgage situations. Family compounds, multi-generational households, and unusual ownership structures.

These files require lender relationships rather than online quote engines. The right answer is often custom — a blend of A-lender, alt-A and credit union products, or a private structure as a 12-month bridge to a permanent solution.

body.heading: How I work these files
paragraphs: Step one: a long discovery conversation. Step two: I model 2–3 plausible structures and walk you through pros, cons and total cost over 5–10 years. Step three: we go to lenders together with a clear story, not a generic application.

whoItsFor: Have a non-standard ownership or income structure
Have been told 'no' by a bank but suspect a solution exists
Want a strategist, not just a mortgage submitter

faqs.question: Are complex files more expensive?
faqs.answer: Sometimes — specialty programs price 0.25–1.5% above prime A-lender rates. Often the alternative is no mortgage at all, in which case the premium is the cost of getting the deal done.
